characters.name: Mr. Bank Manager
characters.description: This  is considered as astub. You can help Making Fiends Wiki toexpand the page by adding more information. Mr. Bank ManagerGender:MaleHometown:ClamburgVoiced by:Dave WassonFirst appearanceTV series:"Toupee" Mr. Bank Manageris a citizen inClamburgand probably a bank manager. He appeared in the episode "Toupee" where thetoupee fiendonMr. Milk's head greeted him. He appeared again in "Pony". He is voiced byDave Wasson.

characters.name: Beandetta
characters.description: BeandettaBeandetta in the "Baking Beans" introGender:FemaleSpecies:BeanVoiced by:Aglaia MortchevaFirst appearanceWeb series:"Baking Beans" Beandettais the bean version ofVendettain the web episode "Baking Beans". A bean herself, Beandetta is seen to be a creator of beans instead offiendsin the original series. In "Baking Beans", Beandetta unleashes beans ontoCharbeanto eat her. The beans end up being canned.

characters.name: Burly fiend
characters.description: Burly fiendGender:MaleSpecies:FiendVoiced by:Peter MerrymanFamilyCreator:VendettaFirst appearanceTV series:"Parentnapped" TheBurly fiendis a fiend made byVendettato steal things. He often makes mistakes, like when Vendetta told him to find her parents,ViktorandVioletta, but instead, he stole, as Vendetta put it, "Charlotte's stupid grandmother!" His punishment is no snacks for the whole night. He started crying when that happened, so he must really like food.

characters.name: Buttons
characters.description: ButtonsButtons in the TV seriesGender:MaleSpecies:HamsterHometown:VermontVoiced by:Amy WinfreyFamilyOwner:CharlotteFirst appearanceWeb series:"Show and Tell"TV series:"Charlotte's First Day" ButtonsisCharlotte's pet hamster, her "favorite hamster in the whole world". He is also very scared ofVendettaand herfiends. According to Charlotte, Buttons likes peanuts and buttons. His prominent feature is the high-pitched squeal he makes when he is scared. While he is shown to be frequently scared of Vendetta and her friends, it is sometimes shown that he may be more frightened by Charlotte than anything else, due to the fact that she has a tendency to treat him more like a plaything than a pet. Buttons is voiced byAmy Winfrey.

characters.name: Buttons

Buttons is voiced byAmy Winfrey.

characters.name: Buttons 2
characters.description: Buttons 2Gender:MaleSpecies:FiendHometown:ClamburgFamilyCreator:VendettaOwner:CharlotteFirst appearanceWeb series:"Scissor Fiend"TV series:"A Fiendish Friend" Scissor FiendorButtons 2is afiendVendettamade to attackCharlotte. He is bird-like in appearance and can cut things with his sharp scissor-like beak. His beak is very powerful, and can cut through trees and even through a house. However,Vendetta's plan backfires as Buttons 2 became a friend of Charlotte. Charlotte believes he is a puppy, and made him into a good friend and pet, renaming him Buttons 2. Charlotte keeps him as a pet in both the web series and TV series.

characters.name: Buttons 2

Charlotte keeps him as a pet in both the web series and TV series.

characters.name: Carl
characters.description: CarlAn "uninvisible" CarlGender:MaleVoiced by:Peter MerrymanFamilyFriend:CharlotteFirst appearanceWeb series:"Invisible" CarlisCharlotte'simaginary friend introduced in the episode "Invisible". He was made "uninvisible" when two fiends sprayed "uninvisible" serum on him, which proved that he actually was real, but just invisible. He then notices that he's visible and he then drinks the invisible potion and turns invisible again.

characters.name: Carl
characters.description: CarlAn "uninvisible" CarlGender:MaleVoiced by:Peter MerrymanFamilyFriend:CharlotteFirst appearanceWeb series:"Invisible" CarlisCharlotte'simaginary friend introduced in the episode "Invisible". characters.name: Cel Phone Fiend
characters.description: Cel Phone FiendSpecies:FiendVoiced by:Peter MerrymanFamilyCreator:VendettaFirst appearanceTV series:"Marvin the Middle Manager" TheCel Phone Fiend[1]is afiendmade byVendetta. It loves to smash things, like phones. It smashed Marvin's phone in "Marvin the Middle Manager". He also worked on the machine that was to destroyCharlotte. It is an extremely large fiend, with the power to demolish almost anything purely by stomping it. Not much else is known about it, since it only made one appearance.

characters.name: Cel Phone Fiend

characters.name: Charbean
characters.description: CharbeanCharbean in the "Baking Beans" introGender:FemaleSpecies:BeanVoiced by:Amy WinfreyFirst appearanceWeb series:"Baking Beans" Charbeanis the bean version ofCharlottein the web episode "Baking Beans". Charbean is a bean who enjoys going own the slide in the schoolyard. This annoysBeandettawho creates beans to eat Charbean. The beans end up being canned.

characters.name: Charlene
characters.description: CharleneGender:FemaleHometown:VermontVoiced by:Amy WinfreyFamilySpouse(s):UnknownChildren:Charlotte's familyGrandchildren:CharlotteFirst appearanceTV series:"Charlotte's First Day" CharleneisCharlotte's cheerful grandmother. She and Charlotte are both happy, outgoing, kind and unaware of evil. Like Charlotte, she is voiced by creatorAmy Winfrey. Charlene did not appear in theweb seriesas she was introduced in thetelevision serieswhen the content was expanded. Charlene runs a store calledGrandma Charlene's Candy and Auto Parts. Charlene is Charlotte's extremely cheery grandmother. She and Charlotte had just moved fromVermont. Charlene first appeared when she dropped Charlotte off at school for the first time. Charlene runs a store calledGrandma Charlene's Candy and Auto Parts, where she sells everything from lemon drops to brake cables. A commercial for the store airs on television, as seen in "Parentnapped". She is also a member of the book club and a friend ofMs. Minty's.

characters.name: Charlotte
characters.description: CharlotteTV seriesWeb seriesNick name(s):Stupid Little Girl; Stupid Girl; Stupid Blue Girl (byVendetta)Gender:FemaleOrigin:VermontSpecies:HumanHometown:ClamburgVoiced by:Amy WinfreyFamilyParents:Unnamed parentsGrandparents:Grandma CharlenePets:ButtonsButtons 2Unnamed fishFirst appearanceWeb series:"New Student"TV series:"Charlotte's First Day" Charlotte(Amy Winfrey) is a blue girl from Vermont, and deuteragonist and a heroine in the series. She's generally oblivious and usually ends up destroyingVendetta'sfiendswithout even trying. Plus, she thinksVendettais her best friend. Charlotte and herparentson a picture.

characters.name: Charlotte clones
characters.description: Charlotte clonesThe Charlotte clones carrying Vendetta to the circusGender:FemaleSpecies:ClonesVoiced by:Amy WinfreyFirst appearanceTV series:"Puppies! Puppies! Puppies!" TheCharlotte clonesappeared in "Puppies, Puppies, Puppies" as the result ofCharlotteusing thefiend multiplierto multiply herself. Charlotte multiplied herself so that she could take care of the multipliedguard dog fiends. The Charlotte clones then made a circus.Vendettawas supposed to be shot out of a cannon as the circus's main event.Grudge, however, saved her and brought her back home.

characters.name: Charlotte's family
characters.description: Charlotte and Charlene'shouse. Charlotteand her family are originally from the U.S. state ofVermont, but Charlotte and her grandmotherCharlenemoved toClamburg. Charlotte'sparentsare astronauts on a space station (However the TV series implies they are actually dead). Charlotte has two pets, the hamsterButtonsand the scissors fiendButtons 2.

characters.name: Charlotte's fish
characters.description: Charlotte's fishSpecies:FishFamilyOwner:CharlotteFirst appearanceTV series:"Parentnapped" Charlotte's fishis a fish that appears in the episode "Parentnapped". Charlotte's fish is seen for the first and only time in the episode "Parentnapped". It is unknown if it is actually Charlotte's pet, or a fish that she got from somewhere, as it had never been seen until this episode.

characters.name: Charlotte's fish

characters.name: Charlotte's parents
characters.description: Charlotte's parentsCharlottewith her parents in a portraitHometown:VermontFamilyParents:Grandma CharleneChildren:CharlotteFirst appearanceTV series:"Parents"Charlotte's unseen parents were first mentioned in the television episode "Parents". According to Charlotte and her grandmotherCharlene, Charlotte's parents are astronauts on a space station. In the episode "Parents",Vendettamakes twofiendlook-a-likes to impersonate Charlotte's parents. In the end of the episode, the fiends are eaten by a whale, andGrudge isabout to shoot Charlotte with another fiend, but misses, firing into the sky. Charlotte sees the contrail left by the fiend, and thinks her parents have returned to the space station. While its mentioned that they are astronauts several details imply they are actually dead:

characters.name: Color blind fiends
characters.description: Color blind fiendsThe color blind fiends in "April Fool's"Species:FiendsVoiced by:Peter MerrymanFirst appearanceWeb series:"April Fool's" TheColor blind fiendsare threefiendscreated byVendetta. They appeared in the episode "April Fool's", where they were supposed to seize "the blue one" onto the rocket, but took Vendetta instead. Charlotte explained to Vendetta that they might be color blind, as they could not tell the difference between "mossy green" and "powder blue". One of the fiends did not like ice cream, but was willing to try it if it was hedgehog flavored. The same fiend was eaten by theGiant Kitty. One of the fiends appear on the boat in "The End of All Things".

characters.name: Color blind fiends

characters.name: Crush fiend
characters.description: Crush fiendSpecies:FiendVoiced by:Peter MerrymanFamilyCreator:VendettaFirst appearanceTV series:"No Singing" TheCrush fiendwas afiendmade byVendettato crush anyone, primarilyCharlotte, if that person sings. She does not attack just singing people; she also attacked a radio that played music. She is not very loyal to Vendetta as she was trying to smash her just, because she was singing to cheer Charlotte up.

characters.description: This  is considered as astub. You can help Making Fiends Wiki toexpand the page by adding more information. Dad fiendTheMom fiend(left) and Dad fiend (right)Species:FiendVoiced by:Dave WassonFirst appearanceTV series:"Parents" TheDad fiendwas afiendcreated byVendettain the episode "Parents" as a substitute parent forCharlotte's father. He has to pretend to be theMom Fiend'swife. He wears a blue mustache as a disguise, and is the second to develop feelings for Charlotte. The fiend was voiced byDave Wasson.

characters.name: Dragon fiend
characters.description: Dragon fiendSpecies:FiendHometown:The Land of CheeseFamilyCreator:VendettaFirst appearanceTV series:"Shorts: Set 2" Dragon fiendis afiendcreated byVendettain her dreams whenCharlottewas tormenting her in her sleep. As it was in her dreams, the fiend appeared instantly when Vendetta said that she would make a fiend. The fiend destroyedThe Land of Cheeseby melting it with its fire-breath. Afterwards, Charlotte befriended it and made it use its breath to toast grilled cheese sandwiches.

characters.name: Eagle fiend
characters.description: Eagle fiendSpecies:FiendFamilyCreator:VendettaFirst appearanceTV series:"Pony" TheEagle Fiendis a giant bird used to get rid ofCharlotte's pony fiendJohn. It can be called with a whistle and it is brown in appearance. Not much else is known about it, as it doesn't stay for very long.

characters.name: Evil mailbox
characters.description: Evil mailboxSpecies:FiendVoiced by:Dave WassonFamilyCreator:VendettaFirst appearanceTV series:"Charlotte's First Day" TheEvil mailboxis afiendmade byVendettathat resembles a post box. While its exact purpose is unknown, it has the ability to stick out its tongue from its flap and eat things. It is located near theGiant Pet SuppliesStore. In "Toupee", a normal mailbox can be seen in place of where the Evil mailbox usually resides.

characters.name: Fienderick
characters.description: FienderickSpecies:FiendVoiced by:Peter MerrymanFamilyCreator:CharlotteFirst appearanceWeb series:"Making Friends" Fienderickis afiendmade byCharlottein the episode "Making Friends", where Charlotte andVendetta's roles were reversed. Fienderick looks like the birdFrederick, but with tentacles. Charlotte made it to destroy Vendetta. However, it tried to eat an air tank Vendetta used for some balloons, and it exploded.

characters.name: Fire-breathing butterfly fiend
characters.description: Fire-breathing butterfliesA fire-breathing butterfly in the episode "April Fool's"Species:FiendFirst appearanceWeb series:"April Fool's" Fire-breathing butterfliesarefiendscreated byVendetta. In the Bulgarian episode "April Fool's", a butterfly lit the rocket with its fire breath and sent Vendetta andCharlotteto space afterButtons 2cut the rope. The butterfly lit the remainder of the rope. Vendetta was screaming, and the English subtitle read "Why did I make fire breathing butterflies?!"
